title: Bullet & Combat System

key_methods: create(...): Bullet  [many overloads, final form: owner, shooter, team, x, y, angle, damage, velocityScl, lifetimeScl, data, mover, aimX, aimY, target]
init(Bullet b): void  [called on bullet add; handles killShooter, instantDisappear, spawnBullets]
update(Bullet b): void  [calls updateTrail, updateHoming, updateWeaving, updateTrailEffects, updateBulletInterval]
hit(Bullet b, float x, float y, boolean createFrags): void  [hitEffect, hitSound, createFrags, createPuddles, createIncend, createUnits, suppressionRange, createSplashDamage, lightning]
hitEntity(Bullet b, Hitboxc entity, float health): void  [damage/pierce/armor logic, knockback, status apply, events]
hitTile(Bullet b, Building build, float x, float y, float initialHealth, boolean direct): void  [heal or damage building, makeFire, lifesteal]
handlePierce(Bullet b, float initialHealth, float x, float y): void  [subtract damage by pierceDamageFactor; remove if damage<=0]
createFrags(Bullet b, float x, float y): void  [spawns fragBullets instances of fragBullet]
createSplashDamage(Bullet b, float x, float y): void  [Damage.damage(), status area, heal area, fire area]
createIncend(Bullet b, float x, float y): void  [Damage.createIncend]

Bullet.note: Generated entity class from BulletComp annotation processor
key_methods: remove(): void  [if !hit: type.despawned(self); then type.removed(self); collided.clear]
update(): void  [move by vel, drag, accel; mover.move; type.update; stickyTarget follow; tileRaycast; pierceCap check]
collision(Hitboxc other, float x, float y): void  [if sticky: stickTo; else type.hit+type.hitEntity; pierce->collided.add or remove]
collides(Hitboxc other): boolean  [team check, air/ground, pierce/collided, stickyTarget==null]
tileRaycast(x1,y1,x2,y2): void  [Bresenham; per-tile: floor/terrain collide, building collide/pierce/sticky]
draw(Bullet b): void  [renders front/back sprite with shrink + spin]
load(): void  [loads backRegion, frontRegion from atlas]

ArtilleryBulletType.constructor_defaults: collidesTiles=false, collides=false, collidesAir=false, scaleLife=true, shrinkX=0.15f, shrinkY=0.5f
key_methods: update(Bullet b): void  [super.update; timer-based trailEffect with fslope*trailSize]

FlakBulletType.description: Anti-air flak that proximity-detonates near enemies
key_methods: update(Bullet b): void  [super.update; Units.nearbyEnemies scan; if enemy within explodeRange: fdata=-1, Time.run(explodeDelay)->b.time=b.lifetime]

ContinuousBulletType.constructor_defaults: speed=0, collides=false, pierce=true, keepVelocity=false, hittable=false, absorbable=false
key_methods: update(Bullet b): void  [if !continuous return; timer(1,damageInterval)->applyDamage; shake; updateBulletInterval]

ContinuousLaserBulletType.description: Animated continuous laser beam with fade-in/out and oscillation
key_methods: draw(Bullet b): void  [fout fade; Damage.findLength; layered color stroke + flame ellipses; Drawf.light line]

LaserBulletType.description: Instantaneous laser; collides on init via Damage.collideLaser
LaserBulletType.constructor_defaults: speed=0, collides=false, pierce=true, keepVelocity=false, hittable=false, absorbable=false, removeAfterPierce=false, delayFrags=true
key_methods: init(Bullet b): void  [Damage.collideLaser(b,length,largeHit,laserAbsorb,pierceCap); laserEffect; optional timed lightning arcs]
draw(Bullet b): void  [curve-in animated layered line + tri tip + side flares; Drawf.light]

ShrapnelBulletType.description: Instant-hit cone/shard; zero speed, collides on init via Damage.collideLaser
ShrapnelBulletType.constructor_defaults: speed=0, collides=false, pierce=true, keepVelocity=false, hittable=false, absorbable=false
key_methods: init(Bullet b): void  [super.init; Damage.collideLaser(b,length,hitLarge,laserAbsorb,pierceCap) -> stores result in b.fdata]
draw(Bullet b): void  [color interpolation, serration triangles, main tri, light]

key_relationships: Bullet has-a BulletType (type field - strategy pattern)
BulletType creates Bullet via create() overloads
BulletType has-a @Nullable BulletType (fragBullet, intervalBullet, lightningType) - composition/self-reference
BulletType depends-on Damage (static calls: collideLaser, collideLine, damage, createIncend, applySuppression)
BulletComp implements Timedc + Damagec + Hitboxc + Teamc + Posc + Drawc + Shielderc + Ownerc + Bulletc + Timerc + Senseable + Settable
BulletComp (-> Bullet) delegates all lifecycle calls to BulletType: init, update, hit, hitEntity, hitTile, despawned, removed, draw, drawLight
lifecycle_flow: 3. Every tick: bullet.update() -> move pos by vel -> mover.move -> type.update(bullet) [homing, weaving, trail, interval bullets]
4. Collision detection: bullet.collides(other) -> bullet.collision(other,x,y) -> type.hit + type.hitEntity OR stickTo
5. Tile raycast: bullet.tileRaycast -> per-tile building.collision -> type.hitTile
6. Bullet removed: if !hit -> type.despawned(bullet); always -> type.removed(bullet) [trail fade, fragOnDespawn]

damage_types.direct: b.damage applied via h.damage() / h.damagePierce() / h.damageArmorMult()
damage_types.splash: Damage.damage() in radius on hit/despawn (splashDamage, splashDamageRadius)
damage_types.status: unit.apply(status, statusDuration) on hitEntity; area via Damage.status()
damage_types.healing: build.heal() or area heal when heals()==true and same team

pierce_mechanics.pierce_units: pierce=true; tracks collided ids; pierceCap limits count
pierce_mechanics.damage_reduction: pierceDamageFactor: bullet.damage -= initialHealth * factor each pierce
pierce_mechanics.removeAfterPierce: if damage<=0 after handlePierce, bullet removed

important_notes: BulletComp uses @EntityDef annotation; Bullet class is code-generated at compile time
BulletType is the strategy/flyweight object; Bullet is the pooled instance
ArtilleryBulletType uses scaleLife=true: lifetime scaled to reach target tile position
FlakBulletType proximity-detonates: scans nearby enemies each flakInterval; sets time=lifetime to force despawn
ContinuousLaserBulletType: fadeTime-based length fade; oscillating width; uses Damage.findLength for wall absorption
MissileBulletType: inherits homing from BulletType.updateHoming via homingPower=0.08
fragBullet self-reference creates shrapnel on hit/despawn; pierceFragCap limits frags per pierce
BulletType.init() auto-sets despawnHit=true when fragBullet/splashDamageRadius/lightning present
sticky bullets use stickTo() and follow target entity rotation each update tick
